stories.title: Cubs Lose Opening Day 10-4 — Boyd Shelled in Washington

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Opening Day: Nationals 10, Cubs 4.

Matt Boyd: 3.2 innings, 6 earned runs. Six-run fourth inning ended it.

PCA had 2 hits and 2 RBI. Bregman went 1-for-4. Not the start anyone wanted.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Two games into 2026 and Cubs Twitter is already in full panic mode.

This is fine. Totally fine.

(Cade Horton is on the mound. It's fine.)

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Bregman Makes His Cubs Debut — 1-for-4, Walk, Standing Ovation

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Alex Bregman is officially a Chicago Cub.

1-for-4 with a walk in his debut. Standing ovation from the Cubs fans in the building.

It begins.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong — 2 Hits, 2 RBI + $115M Extension on Opening Day

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Pete Crow-Armstrong signed a $115 million extension AND went 2-for-4 with 2 RBI on Opening Day.

23 years old. $115M. The future of this franchise just locked himself in.

Yeah, we're going to be okay.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Seiya Suzuki to 10-Day IL — Right Knee Sprain, Conforto in RF

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Seiya Suzuki is on the 10-day IL — right knee sprain, retroactive to March 22.

Michael Conforto slides into RF while he's out.

Cubs are already playing the injury shuffle and it's game 3.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Justin Steele to 60-Day IL — UCL Revision, Rotation Depleted

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Cubs' rotation situation heading into 2026:

Justin Steele — 60-day IL (UCL revision)
Porter Hodge — 15-day IL (right flexor tendon)
Jordan Wicks — 15-day IL (left forearm)

Cade Horton is carrying this staff. No pressure, kid.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Game 3 Preview Today — Cade Horton vs. Miles Mikolas

x_posts.label: Post 6-1
x_posts.text:
Cade Horton takes the mound tonight for Game 3.

He went 11-4 with a 2.67 ERA as a ROOKIE in 2025. This is the guy the Cubs built around.

Miles Mikolas better be ready. 🔥

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

x_posts.label: Post 6-2
x_posts.text:
First pitch in minutes.

Cade Horton. Nationals Park. Win or go home on this road trip.

Let's go, Cubs.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Perspective — It's Game 1 of 162, Not the End of the World

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Relax. It's game 1 of 162.

The 2016 Cubs lost on Opening Day too. You know how that ended.

Matt Boyd will not be starting Game 7 of the World Series.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs
